index c46c8c20..4d40b8b6 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Manufacturing/Routing/CalculateRoutingLine.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Manufacturing/Routing/CalculateRoutingLine.Codeunit.al
@@ -1309,7 +1309,7 @@ codeunit 99000774 "Calculate Routing Line"
         end;
 
         MaxLotSize :=
-          ExpectedOperOutput *
+          ProdOrderQty *
           (1 + ProdOrderRoutingLine."Scrap Factor % (Accumulated)") *
           (1 + TotalScrap / 100) +
           ProdOrderRoutingLine."Fixed Scrap Qty. (Accum.)";

diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Journal/JobJournalLine.Table.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Journal/JobJournalLine.Table.al
index fb253f0b..98f19672 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Journal/JobJournalLine.Table.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Journal/JobJournalLine.Table.al
@@ -1794,9 +1794,19 @@ table 210 "Job Journal Line"
                 end else
                     "Unit Cost (LCY)" := ConvertAmountToLCY("Unit Cost", UnitAmountRoundingPrecision);
         end else
-            if (Type = Type::Resource) and ("Posting Date" <> xRec."Posting Date") and ("Currency Code" <> '') then
-                "Unit Cost (LCY)" := "Unit Cost (LCY)"
-            else
+            if (Type = Type::Resource) then begin
+                if RetrieveCostPrice(CurrFieldNo) then begin
+                    Res.Get("No.");
+                    RetrievedCost := Res."Unit Cost" * "Qty. per Unit of Measure";
+                    "Unit Cost" := ConvertAmountToFCY(RetrievedCost, UnitAmountRoundingPrecisionFCY);
+                    "Unit Cost (LCY)" := Round(RetrievedCost, UnitAmountRoundingPrecision);
+                    "Direct Unit Cost (LCY)" := Round(Res."Direct Unit Cost" * "Qty. per Unit of Measure", UnitAmountRoundingPrecision);
+                end else
+                    if ("Posting Date" <> xRec."Posting Date") and ("Currency Code" <> '') then
+                        "Unit Cost (LCY)" := "Unit Cost (LCY)"
+                    else
+                        "Unit Cost (LCY)" := ConvertAmountToLCY("Unit Cost", UnitAmountRoundingPrecision);
+            end else
                 "Unit Cost (LCY)" := ConvertAmountToLCY("Unit Cost", UnitAmountRoundingPrecision);
 
         OnAfterUpdateUnitCost(Rec, UnitAmountRoundingPrecision, CurrFieldNo);
diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Journal/JobJournalLinePrice.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Journal/JobJournalLinePrice.Codeunit.al
index 82a002f3..fdb9ee2f 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Journal/JobJournalLinePrice.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Journal/JobJournalLinePrice.Codeunit.al
@@ -78,10 +78,12 @@ codeunit 7023 "Job Journal Line - Price" implements "Line With Price"
                     CurrPriceType::Sale:
                         Result :=
                             Result or
+                            (JobJournalLine."Unit Price" = 0) or
                             not (CalledByFieldNo in [JobJournalLine.FieldNo(Quantity), JobJournalLine.FieldNo("Variant Code")]);
                     CurrPriceType::Purchase:
                         Result :=
                             Result or
+                            (JobJournalLine."Unit Cost" = 0) or
                             not ((CalledByFieldNo = JobJournalLine.FieldNo(Quantity)) or
                                 ((CalledByFieldNo = JobJournalLine.FieldNo("Variant Code")) and not IsSKU))
                 end;

diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Warehouse/Worksheet/WhseWorksheetLine.Table.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Warehouse/Worksheet/WhseWorksheetLine.Table.al
index 13f1dd16..ed350e20 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Warehouse/Worksheet/WhseWorksheetLine.Table.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Warehouse/Worksheet/WhseWorksheetLine.Table.al
@@ -708,10 +708,14 @@ table 7326 "Whse. Worksheet Line"
                           WhseWkshLine."Source Subline No.",
                           true, TempWhseActivLine));
                     if LineReservedQtyBase > 0 then begin
-                        if LineReservedQtyBase <= WhseWkshLine."Qty. to Handle (Base)" then
-                            ReservedAndAssignedBase := LineReservedQtyBase
-                        else
+                        ReservedAndAssignedBase := WhseAvailMgt.CalcLineReservQtyOnPicksShips(
+                            WhseWkshLine."Source Type", WhseWkshLine."Source Subtype",
+                            WhseWkshLine."Source No.", WhseWkshLine."Source Subline No.",
+                            WhseWkshLine."Source Line No.", -LineReservedQtyBase, TempWhseActivLine);
+                        if ReservedAndAssignedBase < WhseWkshLine."Qty. to Handle (Base)" then
                             ReservedAndAssignedBase := WhseWkshLine."Qty. to Handle (Base)";
+                        if LineReservedQtyBase < ReservedAndAssignedBase then
+                            ReservedAndAssignedBase := LineReservedQtyBase;
                         TotalReservedAndAssignedBase := TotalReservedAndAssignedBase + ReservedAndAssignedBase;
                     end;
                 end;

diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Document/SalesLineReserve.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Document/SalesLineReserve.Codeunit.al

         if (NewSalesLine.Type <> NewSalesLine.Type::Item) or (NewSalesLine.Quantity = 0) or (NewSalesLine.Reserve <> NewSalesLine.Reserve::Always) then
             exit(false);
 
+        if ((NewSalesLine."Document Type" = NewSalesLine."Document Type"::Invoice) and (NewSalesLine."Shipment No." <> '')) or
+           ((NewSalesLine."Document Type" = NewSalesLine."Document Type"::"Credit Memo") and (NewSalesLine."Return Receipt No." <> ''))

+            exit(false);
+
         Item.SetLoadFields("Costing Method");
         Item.Get(NewSalesLine."No.");

         if IsHandled then
             exit;
 
-        if NewDueDate < ReminderEntry2."Due Date" then
+        if NewDueDate = ReminderEntry2."Due Date" then
             exit;
 
         ReminderEntry2.Validate("Due Date", NewDueDate);
